channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: GTA VI : Rockstar annonce l’ouverture des précommandes, mais ne révèle pas le plus important
item.description: En attendant la grande sortie de GTA VI, Rockstar Games annonce l'ouverture des précommandes du jeu, mais toujours pas son prix.

item.title: Boulanger fait moitié prix sur le Pixel 10 Pro et offre 2 cadeaux Google très utiles
item.description: Axé sur la photographie et les fonctionnalités IA les plus avancées de Google, le Pixel 10 Pro profite d'une offre XXL. Grâce à une remise inédite et un bonus de reprise avantageux, ce flagship incontournable perd près de 50 % de sa valeur initiale pour devenir une affaire en or à ne pas manquer, surtout qu'un stand PixelSnap et un Google TV Streamer sont offerts. ...

item.title: Moins de 14 kg et en carbone : on a vu le premier Canyon électrique équipé du dernier moteur Bosch
item.description: Premier vélo électrique en carbone à intégrer le moteur arrière Bosch Hub Line, le Canyon Roadlite:ON CF affiche un poids sous les 14 kg pour un tarif assez raisonnable.

item.title: Xiaomi officialise son premier casque Redmi et son prix va faire mal à la concurrence
item.description: Xiaomi officialise enfin son premier casque audio circum-aural, le Redmi Headphones Neo, au prix de 59,99 €. Au programme : réduction de bruit de 42 dB, haut-parleurs en titane et autonomie XL.

item.title: LinkedIn will now let you show off exactly what skills you have with all your favorite workplace apps
item.description: Gone are the days of self-declared skills – LinkedIn will now verify them and provide "data-backed" summaries via Connected Apps.

item.title: How to watch M6+ outside France – stream M6 from anywhere with a VPN
item.description: Here's how to watch M6+ from outside France, and learn how to access streams – including 54 FIFA World Cup 2026 matches live free – from anywhere abroad with a VPN.

item.title: Amazon’s Kindle Colorsoft bundle is almost half off for Prime Day
item.description: Amazon’s Kindle Colorsoft Essentials Bundle is on sale for $182.97 (originally $334.97) as an early Prime Day deal, the lowest price we’ve seen for the combo. Unlike other Kindles, the Colorsoft’s color E Ink screen is great for comic books and graphics novels, illustrated books, or just perusing book covers while deciding what to read […]

item.title: How to watch Czechia vs South Africa: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-off time for FIFA World Cup 2026 Group A fixture
item.description: How to watch Czechia vs South Africa for free online and from anywhere in Group A of the FIFA World Cup 2026. Both sides must win after opening-game defeats.

item.title: New Verizon Shine loyalty program will give you perks for sticking with the network
item.description: Verizon Shine has landed to reward your loyalty and remove activation and upgrade fees.

item.title: VPN deal of the week: CyberGhost is the cheapest I've ever seen it — nearly $2/month cheaper than NordVPN
item.description: 45 days to decide, over 100 locations, and private payment options to suit anyone

item.title: Photoshop and Premiere now have AI assistants
item.description: Adobe's plan to stick AI assistants into all of its Creative Cloud suite is now fully underway, with new chatbots now rolling out to its biggest editing and design apps. As part of a public beta launching today, Photoshop, Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io now each have a bespoke AI Assistant that can be used […]

item.title: Adobe’s redesigned AI studio remembers what your creations look like
item.description: Adobe is introducing some new capabilities for its Firefly AI assistant, alongside a "reimagined" AI studio that lets you edit and generate new designs from a single interface. The new Firefly experience launching today in private beta is designed to give you "persistent context, reusable assets, and organized workflows" across your projects, according to Adobe, […]...

item.title: Adobe adds its AI assistant to Premiere, Illustrator and InDesign
item.description: Adobe is updating its Firefly AI assistant with new chops, and adding it to Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign and Frame.io.

item.title: Adobe brings its Firefly AI Assistant inside of Premiere, Photoshop and Illustrator
item.description: Adobe has added its Firefly AI tool to some of its most important apps.

item.title: XGIMI MemoMind One review: Smart glasses, creepy AI
item.description: XGIMI's MemoMind One is a good pair of smart glasses blighted by a creepy AI that spies on you.

item.title: Ultrahuman's M2 Live is an updated glucose tracker for metabolic tracking
item.description: Ultrahuman's M2 Live uses Abbott's cheaper Lingo sensors to help keep track of your blood sugar.

item.title: Waymo Recalls Robotaxis Over Risk They'll Drive at Speed Into Freeway Construction Zones
item.description: The company's latest recall of 3,871 vehicles follows incidents of its autonomous cars prioritizing other hazards or failing to recognize closed construction zones altogether.

item.title: 007 First Light devs say post-launch content is in IO Interactive's 'DNA' and is now something players are 'starting to expect' — 'We want the players to come back, and we want to create more content'
item.description: IO Interactive has teased 007 First Light's upcoming post-launch content following the game's "unreal" reception.

item.title: Il purifie, ventile et humidifie l’air : ce purificateur d’air Dyson est 200 € moins cher pendant la canicule
item.description: Avec le retour des fortes chaleurs, on ne dit pas non à une petite brise rafraîchissante chez soi. C'est ce qu'offre le Dyson Purifier Humidify+Cool PH2, qui peut en plus purifier l'air d'une pièce et l'humidifier si besoin. Un appareil polyvalent que Dyson affiche à 599 euros au lieu de 799 euros, d'ailleurs.

item.title: Apple serait sur le point de casser une fonction d’iCloud pourtant bien pratique
item.description: La fonction « Masquer mon e-mail » pourrait devenir bien plus simple à bloquer pour les fournisseurs de service.

item.title: I regret to inform you that Dolby Vision HDR has once again been dropped from Disney+ in parts of Europe
item.description: Disney+ drops Dolby Vision in multiple European countries after losing a patent dispute in court — and also 3D movies, but not so many people care about that

item.title: « Maserati n’est pas à vendre » : voici la stratégie du patron de Stellantis pour sauver la marque
item.description: En grande difficulté, Maserati cherche à garder la tête hors de l’eau. Pour cela, Stellantis envisage désormais de nouer des partenariats avec d’autres marques. Et il pourrait logiquement s’agir de constructeurs chinois de voitures électriques.

item.title: Sur Android 17, Gemini ne vous quittera plus : l’IA sera toujours à portée de clic
item.description: Gemini sera bientôt accessible via une bulle flottante sur Android 17, permettant un multitâche facilité. L'utilisateur peut ainsi avoir une connexion en continu avec l'IA de Google.

item.title: New York Knicks parade today: Parade route, start time, livestream details
item.description: Everything you need to know to watch the New York Knicks parade on Thursday, June 18, including livestream information, parade route details, and more.

item.title: SteamOS 3.8 passe en version stable et prépare la Steam Machine
item.description: Après plusieurs mois en bêta, SteamOS 3.8 passe en version stable. Au menu : le premier vrai pas vers la Steam Machine, un noyau Linux tout neuf et une longue liste de corrections.

item.title: Vampire Survivors menace de boycotter Fortnite à cause de l’IA d’Epic Games
item.description: Quelques heures après avoir été annoncé comme futur invité de Fortnite, Vampire Survivors fait machine arrière. La raison : l’IA générative qu’Epic Games met au cœur de son futur moteur, l'Unreal Engine.

item.title: Which Blink home security camera should I buy? Here's what you need to know to help you pick the right model
item.description: Looking to buy a cheap Blink security cam in the Amazon Prime Day sales? This guide will help you make sense of your options

item.title: GTA 6 hype has reached 'unprecedented' levels as one company schedules a temporary 'operational pause' for its release — and I can't tell if it's a joke
item.description: GTA 6 is about to take the world by storm once it launches on November 19, 2026, and one company has already set a temporary workday shutdown for it.

item.title: Fortinet firewalls hit by huge password-stealing attack — around 75,000 users possibly affected
item.description: Researchers discovered a major database containing plaintext passwords.

item.title: Click to Pay sur Revolut : finito la saisie du numéro de carte pour payer en ligne
item.description: Visa a annoncé le 16 juin dernier dans un communiqué de presse étendre la méthode Click to Pay aux détenteurs d'une carte Revolut. Ce service vise à faciliter les paiements en ligne et surtout à gagner du temps puisqu'il n'y a plus besoin de saisir le numéro de sa carte bancaire à chaque transaction.

item.title: Samsung The Frame Pro 2026 Review: Pricey But Worth It
item.description: The Frame Pro 2026 benefits from meaningful tweaks. AI audio and picture tuning work in tandem with a new anti-glare coating to deliver impressive benefits.

item.title: This Ghost in the Shell keyboard makes me want to activate the hundred spidery robot fingers inside my regular fingers
item.description: Anime collaborations are everywhere, from Gundam watches and Naruto nights at Major League ballparks to just about anything Evangelion. But these Ghost in the Shell keyboards from Iqunix are some of the coolest examples I've seen of anime-inspired everyday tech. They look sick and they type and play great. At $249 they're a hefty upcharge […]

item.title: Pixi’s new iOS app turns text messages into interactive AR experiences
item.description: Forget stickers, GIFs, and emoji reactions. Pixi is betting that the next evolution of messaging is interactive augmented reality (AR).

item.title: Here’s how we live forever
item.description: The secret to longevity may come from artificial superintelligence for biology. Everyone is talking about longevity.

item.title: AI-driven velocity is manufacturing’s new competitive edge
item.description: The companies that do well in the future will use AI to move quickly and innovate. In the volatile world of manufacturing, one factor is emerging as the ultimate differentiator in 2026: speed, and in particular, operational velocity. This is the ability to sense market changes, make decisions quickly and decisively, and recover swiftly across the entire value chain....

item.title: Here’s how we created a product category that didn’t exist
item.description: Investors panned our at-home insemination company, but we did it anyway and just sold our company. In 2014, my husband came home from a run one day with the crazy idea that we should make an at-home insemination kit. We had zero experience in the fertility industry, no MBA, no connections, and not much money. But we had one important element: first-hand user experience. We knew personally that this product was greatly needed. We had looked for it, and never found it....

item.title: Waymo recalls nearly 4,000 robotaxis to stop them driving into highway construction zones
item.description: The company has identified at least 13 instances where its robotaxis drove into highway sections closed for construction.

item.title: Midjourney is working on an full-body ultrasonic scanner. For real.
item.description: Midjourney, the company known for its AI-based image generator, is developing a full-body ultrasonic scanner.

item.title: Trump claims Apple and Intel closed deal to manufacture chips in the US
item.description: In a Truth Social post, Trump said Apple and Intel have already finalized an agreement to manufacture chips for the former's devices stateside.

item.title: The Facebook app is crashing for many — here's what we know about the Android issues
item.description: The Facebook app isn't playing ball today

item.title: Kindle Prime Day deals have already started — I see the Kindle, Paperwhite, and Colorsoft all on sale with up to 33% off, with one small catch
item.description: As long as you're happy to go with the kids' versions, this week's early Prime Day Kindle deals are fantastic.

item.title: Amazon’s Fire Tablets, Tested, So You Don’t Have To (2026)
item.description: Whether you need a travel-friendly slate or something affordable for the kids, we tested every model to find the right one for every occasion.
